## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss account management strategy and improve service quality across all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Leadership to take direct control of accounts to establish consistent, high-quality processes](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Focus on creating scalable systems for managing 100s to 1000s of accounts in the future](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Identify and address gaps in account manager capabilities, particularly for technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Streamline meeting attendance and improve internal communication/automation processes](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

## Topics

### Current Account Management Challenges

  - [Some accounts performing well (e.g., Ramp), others struggling (e.g., Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Inconsistent quality across different account managers](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Technical accounts particularly challenging for less experienced team members](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Need to improve training and onboarding for new account managers](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Strategic Shift in Account Management

  - [Leadership (Marcel, Jimmy, Kyle) to take direct control of accounts](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Goals:](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [Establish consistent, high-quality processes](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [Create scalable systems for future growth (aiming for 1000+ accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [Improve client satisfaction and potential for upsells](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Divide accounts based on expertise (e.g., Marcel handling technical clients)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Gradually delegate back to account managers as processes improve](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

### Account Manager Roles and Development

  - [Varying skill levels among account managers (e.g., Andre stronger, Bianca needs more support)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Shift focus to supporting roles for less experienced team members](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Improve training on:](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [Strategic thinking (e.g., not overrelying on competitor comparison content)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Reporting and SEO skills](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Understanding overall growth objectives](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Content Production and Quality Control

  - [Emphasize quality over quantity, especially for high-profile clients](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Implement multi-stage review process:](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Writers create initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [Account managers provide first round of edits](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [Leadership reviews for strategic alignment and quality](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Team Structure and Scaling

  - [Plans for dedicated SEO support roles (2 positions)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Exploring options for fractional automation support](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [Building a pool of specialized writers (10+ writers across multiple accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Considering hiring writers at $8-$12/hour for cost-effective scaling](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Internal Processes and Communication

  - [Reduce meeting attendees to streamline client calls](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Implement new tools for meeting recordings and automated summaries](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Improve coordination between account managers and writers](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Leadership to take over strategic management of assigned accounts immediately](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Develop comprehensive, standardized processes for account management](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Refine training programs for account managers, focusing on identified skill gaps](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Explore hiring options for SEO support and specialized writers](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Implement new meeting attendance and communication protocols](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Continue discussions on optimizing writer utilization and content production processes](https://fathom.video/share/-ZDZ93xntJMfuK5UGoEvCyYyC6F7NKxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
